notes: Map is 10x8 blocks = 20x16 tiles; top 3 rows are solid exterior wall/ceiling.
The swaying Bellsprout pillar (P) runs through x=11 from y=4 to y=15 — the animated center pillar.
Three staircases (^) to 2F: center at (6,4), left at (2,6), right at (17,3).
Exit mats (E) at y=15 for warps south to Violet City at tile x=9 and x=10.
Statues (S) at bg_event positions (7,15) and (12,15): Pokemon statue flanking the entrance.
Sage2 (NPC, wander 1x1) at object_event (6,7) — left of pillar.
Granny (NPC, standing left) at object_event (11,12) — right of pillar.
Sage Chow (TRAINER, standing up, sight 4) at object_event (3,5).
Parlyz Heal item ball at object_event (16,7) — event flag EVENT_SPROUT_TOWER_1F_PARLYZ_HEAL.
Layout is approximate; exact block positions reconstructed from object_event tile coordinates in SproutTower1F.asm.

npcs.dialogue_summary: Only if you reach the top will you obtain an HM.

npcs.name: Sage
npcs.dialogue_summary: Sprout Tower was built long ago as a place for Pokemon training.

npcs.name: Granny
npcs.dialogue_summary: A Bellsprout over 100 feet tall became the center pillar here.

npcs.name: Teacher
npcs.dialogue_summary: See the pillar shaking? People are training upstairs.

trainers.name: Chow
trainers.seen_text: We stand guard in this tower. Here, we express our gratitude to honor all Pokemon.
trainers.after_text: All living beings coexist through cooperation. We must always be thankful for this.

events.description: Sage Chow challenges player on sight with line-of-sight 4 facing up. After defeat: sets EVENT_BEAT_SAGE_CHOW.

notes: Sprout Tower 1F is the ground floor of the three-story tower north of Violet City. The defining feature is the swaying Bellsprout pillar that runs through the center of all three floors — an ancient Bellsprout over 100 feet tall that became the tower's structural core. This floor has one trainer (Sage Chow) and one item (Parlyz Heal). Four non-trainer NPCs provide exposition about the tower's history and the pillar. Three staircases connect to 2F: a center staircase at (6,4), left at (2,6), and right at (17,3). Two Pokemon statues flank the south door. The tower uses TILESET_TOWER and plays MUSIC_SPROUT_TOWER. Map dimensions confirmed from map_constants.asm: 10x8 blocks (20x16 tiles). All warp_event, object_event, and bg_event coordinates sourced directly from SproutTower1F.asm.
